lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. It shows minor wear on the interior and exterior from regular use. All mechanical systems are functioning properly and it has been regularly serviced.
Poor condition.
The vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and extensive wear on both the interior and exterior. It requires major repairs to be fully functional.

Get ready for your next big project! This vehicle offers a fantastic opportunity for any mechanic or DIY enthusiast looking for a rewarding challenge at a very budget-friendly price. While it needs some serious mechanical and cosmetic attention to get back on the road, it's a solid foundation for someone with the right skills and vision!

This vehicle is in mint, showroom-perfect condition. It has been meticulously maintained and preserved, showing absolutely no signs of wear or age. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep factory luster and zero scratches or dents. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine, original state, with every feature functioning as intended. Mechanically, the car performs exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line, with all systems functioning perfectly. This is a collector-grade example that requires no work whatsoever.

This vehicle is in mint, showroom condition and has been meticulously preserved. The exterior paint is flawless with no scratches, chips, or swirl marks, and the interior is pristine with no signs of wear on the leather or upholstery. Mechanically, it is in perfect working order; all scheduled maintenance has been performed on time by certified technicians and is fully documented. It drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example of this model that has been stored in a climate-controlled garage.

We are proud to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, offered in showroom condition. This example has been maintained to the highest standards, exhibiting a flawless exterior and a pristine interior that reflects its limited usage and careful stewardship. A truly investment-grade acquisition for the sophisticated driver who demands uncompromising quality.

Hey there! You seriously have to see this beauty in person to believe it. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve kept it tucked away and pampered it since day one—not a single blemish to be found. If you're looking for that perfect, like-new feel without the brand-new price tag, this is definitely the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!

This FD3S RX-7 represents the pinnacle of 90s JDM engineering, preserved in showroom condition. The 13B-REW rotary engine retains factory-spec compression, utilizing its sequential twin-turbocharger configuration to provide seamless forced induction throughout the powerband. Its longitudinal front-midship chassis remains structurally rigid, paired with a pristine double-wishbone suspension and a helical limited-slip differential for surgical handling. Mechanical integrity is paramount here; all vacuum lines and cooling system components have been maintained to mitigate heat-soak, ensuring the apex seals and eccentric shaft operate within optimal
Mint condition. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Clean title. Service records available. Inspection ready.

Presenting a true collector-grade specimen that has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely no chips or swirl marks, while the interior remains in showroom condition—the premium leather is supple, and every electronic component functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, accompanied by a complete, documented service history and a drive that feels as tight and responsive as the day it left the factory. This is a rare opportunity to own a virtually untouched example of automotive excellence, perfect for the discerning enthusiast who demands a turn-key, investment-quality vehicle.

Presenting a peerless example of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-state condition. It has been preserved with fastidious attention to detail, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that reflects a standard of care rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Fully inspected to ensure absolute mechanical integrity, this offering represents a premier acquisition for the sophisticated buyer seeking an investment-grade driving experience.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, this vehicle arrives in showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved to the highest standards, it offers a peerless driving experience for the discerning collector. Every detail, from the flawless finish to the pristine interior, reflects a commitment to uncompromising quality. This is an investment-grade opportunity for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It’s been pampered since day one and drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the sticker shock, this is the one for you! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!
Presented is a collector-grade E92 M3, featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 with individual throttle bodies
Mint condition. Single owner. No accidents. Garaged. Full service records included.

This exceptional vehicle is a true showroom-quality specimen, meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment and maintained with an open-checkbook philosophy. The exterior paint retains a mirror-like depth and luster, entirely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather remains supple and matte, the carpets are pristine under original floor mats, and there is absolutely no wear on the touchpoints or switchgear. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the panoramic glass roof, operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is flawless, accompanied by an exhaustive folder of service records from authorized specialists, ensuring it drives with the same tightness and responsiveness as the day it was delivered. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle in absolute peak condition.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle exhibits a flawless exterior finish complemented by a showroom-quality interior, reflecting meticulous ownership and zero compromises in upkeep. A rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a machine in truly peerless condition.

Presenting an automotive specimen of uncompromising caliber. This vehicle remains in an exemplary state, having been maintained to the most rigorous standards of mechanical and aesthetic excellence. Its pristine condition reflects a legacy of meticulous ownership, offering a definitive acquisition for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than showroom-grade perfection.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe the condition of this beauty! It’s been my absolute pride and joy, kept in a climate-controlled garage and hand-washed every single weekend. It looks and drives exactly like it just rolled off the showroom floor—not a single scratch or speck of dust to be found. If you're looking for absolute perfection, this is the one for you! I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have!

This E46 M3 is a concourse-quality specimen featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six engine, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving valvetrain is meticulously maintained, with a documented VANOS overhaul and proactive subframe reinforcement already completed. Power is delivered to the rear wheels via a precision Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-variable differential lock. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from original suspension geometry and pristine forged Style 67 wheels. The exterior retains its factory depth and luster with no evidence of panel misalignment or paint degradation, while the cabin maintains its original matte finish and tactile integrity. A mechanically flawless, collector-grade example for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Full service records available.

Step into what can only be described as a time capsule. This vehicle is in breathtaking, showroom-ready condition, having been meticulously kept in a climate-controlled environment since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like factory finish completely free of swirls, chips, or imperfections, complemented by curb-rash-free alloy wheels. Inside, the cabin retains its original new-car scent; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and taut, with zero wear on the bolsters or touchpoints. Every electronic feature, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver assists, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a fully documented service history and a whisper-quiet engine that delivers smooth, effortless power. This is a rare opportunity for a collector or enthusiast to own a truly immaculate example that looks, feels, and drives as if it just left the assembly line.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of unparalleled distinction. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, maintained in showroom condition with meticulous attention to every mechanical and aesthetic detail. Its history is documented, its performance is flawless, and its presentation is beyond reproach. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands an uncompromising standard of excellence, this vehicle offers a definitive ownership experience.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, reflecting a standard of maintenance that is truly uncompromising. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior, underscores its status as a collector-grade acquisition. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than excellence, this offering represents the definitive choice in its class.

Hi everyone! 🌟 I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in truly flawless condition—it honestly looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it garaged and meticulously maintained. It drives perfectly and is ready for its next adventure. You won’t find a cleaner one out there! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This is an impeccable example of the E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54B32 3.2L inline-six powerplant with its signature individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. This specimen has been fastidiously maintained, with documented subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive rod bearing service already completed. The high-revving engine is mated to a crisp 6-speed manual transmission, delivering linear power to the rear wheels via a variable M-differential lock. The chassis remains exceptionally taut, benefitting from refreshed bushings and an OEM+ suspension setup that preserves the factory-intended kinematics. Finished in a pristine Laguna Seca Blue over a flawless interior, this vehicle exhibits zero mechanical fatigue or cosmetic wear, making it a definitive collector-grade asset for the purist driver.
2022 model. Mint condition. No scratches or dents. Interior like new. Garage kept. Full service history. Local pickup only.

This vehicle is the definition of showroom quality. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep, glass-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in an absolute pristine state; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, and every electronic component functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is indistinguishable from new, with a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. With exceptionally low mileage and a history of adult ownership, this is a rare opportunity to own a

Presenting an unrivaled example of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved to the highest standards, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning professional. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of such impeccable caliber and verified provenance.
